recentTweets.text:
🚨DOH issues new alert for toxic algae🚨

As we head into the weekend, make sure you are not swimming, eating fish, or recreating in the water near Port Mayaca along Lake Okeechobee. There is toxic blue-green algae present.

https://t.co/mBHxaZcB62
Congratulations to fellow Floridian, Spc. Brandon Brown for earning @USNationalGuard’s Soldier of the Year!

Store the water properly, clean it, and send it south as Mother Nature intended. Not one drop into the St. Lucie River. Any drop of water from Lake Okeechobee into our estuaries is a drop that risks toxic conditions that have plagued our communities for decades.

Nobody’s going https://t.co/XLEsfRKQmM
